    • Method Detail

      • handleForm

        public void handleForm(com.jsyn.util.soundfile.IFFParser parser,
                       int ckID,
                       int ckSize,
                       int type)
                throws java.io.IOException
        Called by parse() method to handle FORM chunks in an AIFF specific manner.
        Parameters:
        ckID - four byte chunk ID such as 'data'
        ckSize - size of chunk in bytes
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - If parsing fails, or IO error occurs.

      • handleChunk

        public void handleChunk(com.jsyn.util.soundfile.IFFParser parser,
                        int ckID,
                        int ckSize)
                 throws java.io.IOException
        Called by parse() method to handle chunks in an AIFF specific manner.
        Parameters:
        ckID - four byte chunk ID such as 'data'
        ckSize - size of chunk in bytes
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - If parsing fails, or IO error occurs.

      • getDataPosition

        public long getDataPosition()
        Returns:
        Number of bytes from beginning of stream where sound data resides.

      • getNumBytesRead

        public long getNumBytesRead()
        This can be read by another thread when load()ing a sample to determine how many bytes have been read so far.

      • getFileSize

        public long getFileSize()
        This can be read by another thread when load()ing a sample to determine how many bytes need to be read.

      • findOrCreateCuePoint

        protected SampleMarker findOrCreateCuePoint(int uniqueID)

                 throws java.io.IOException

                                       int textLength)
